opinion.h4: JACOBS v. ARIZONA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF ARIZONA. No. 420, Misc. Decided October 21, 1963.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
375 U.S. 46 CHODOROV v. NEW YORK. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 477, Misc. Decided October 21, 1963.
Leo A. Larkin, Seymour B. Quel and John A. Murray for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
